race.description: Racing Again On Friday 15Th May Flat Race
race.comment: LULTIMATOM (6) represents a leading yard that do particularly well in this sphere. Beaten just 1.25L second at Fakenham last time and could easily go one better. The one to beat. STREAMHILL (13) missed by 6L at Cork. Gets handy weight allowance from jockey and holds winning claims now. BELLS GROVE (1) placed on all three starts so far including a good 2L third at Cheltenham when last seen. Big chance of now shedding the maiden tag. GREENHILLS OF CORK (2) was well fancied by the market only to disappoint racing at Thurles last time. Freshened and would look a potential threat to all if judged on a more promising debut effort before that.
